description_long: This is a sleek, single-seat military jet airplane with a pointed nose, narrow fuselage, and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft is painted primarily in light gray with black accents on the nose and cockpit area, and it features U.S. Air Force insignia and markings along the fuselage and wings. The wings are mid-mounted and relatively short, with small horizontal stabilizers at the rear and a prominent vertical tail fin. The cockpit is enclosed with a dark canopy, positioned near the front of the fuselage, and the jet intake is visible beneath the cockpit area. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable. The overall design is optimized for high-speed flight, with minimal external protrusions and a streamlined profile.
description: A streamlined, single-seat military jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, gray and black coloring, and U.S. Air Force markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, narrow fuselage, and the cockpit canopy with swept-back wings visible on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the U.S. Air Force insignia, the mid-mounted swept wings, and the prominent vertical tail fin.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, the shape of the fuselage, and the arrangement of the tail and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aircraft's profile, markings, and the streamlined design of the tail and nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers mounted low on the tail.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
